design_philosophy.description: A sterile, precise, and authoritative interface designed for accuracy and efficiency. White surfaces, deep slate text, and color-coded status indicators mimic the cleanliness of a laboratory and the rigorous structure of international logistics.

rules: Data tables and dense information must use IBM Plex Sans.
Numbers in dashboards (prices, weights) should use tabular-nums class for alignment.
Use 'tracking-tight' for all headings larger than 24px.

primary.description: Deep Slate - Used for Sidebar, Primary Buttons, Strong Headings

secondary.description: Lab Teal - Used for Secondary Actions, Active States, Success indicators

accent.description: Safety Orange - Used for Alerts, 'Action Required', Warnings

usage_rules: Never use gradients for backgrounds. Keep surfaces flat and clean.
Sidebar must be dark (Slate 900) to anchor the layout.
Cards must be White (#FFFFFF) with a subtle border (#E2E8F0).
Use text colors (slate-500/slate-900) to create hierarchy, not just font size.

rules: Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6
Always use 'h-full' on cards within grid cells to ensure equal height.

surfaces.glass: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/20 (Only for sticky headers)

button.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all
button.secondary: bg-teal-600 text-white hover:bg-teal-700 shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all
button.outline: border border-slate-300 bg-transparent hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-all

input.default: border-slate-300 focus:border-teal-500 focus:ring-teal-500 rounded-md bg-white text-slate-900 placeholder:text-slate-400

card.wrapper: rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white text-slate-950 shadow-sm

table.wrapper: w-full overflow-auto rounded-md border border-slate-200 bg-white

badge.default: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-slate-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-950 focus:ring-offset-2 text-slate-950

login.layout: Split Screen: Left side Form, Right side Image
login.quote: "Precision in every drop, integrity in every shipment."

chart_types: Map/Globe (Active Routes - Use Static Image or Simple Map)

dashboard_admin.focus: System Overview, User Management, High-level Stats

rules: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text.
Interactive elements must have a focus ring.
Use semantic HTML (main, section, article, aside).
All images must have alt text.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Keep surfaces flat and clean.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use specific properties for transitions (NOT transition: all).
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
instructions_to_main_agent: Follow the 'modules_design' section to build specific dashboards. Use the color palette strictly to maintain the 'Professional Lab' aesthetic. Ensure the layout is responsive and mobile-friendly, although the primary use case is likely desktop for this complex ERP.
